arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Espanyol injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Madrid and Espanyol.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid taking shape as 'preparations' begin
arts.sum: Real Madrid are positioning themselves to make a move for Xabi Alonso, according to German media. At least that is according to BILD, which asserts that Leverkusen director Simon Rolfes is working hard to prepare the club for radical changes next year.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'identify' 42-year-old as first-choice Carlo Ancelotti replacement
arts.sum: Real Madrid will make an attempt to appoint Bayer Leverkusen manager Xabi Alonso as their new head coach next summer, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Under-fire Real Madrid star is dominating Europe’s top-5 leagues in final-third passes
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic, highlighting the excellence of one Real Madrid star when it comes to progressive passing this season, has on Friday come to the fore online. The player in…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'lead race' to sign Bundesliga superstar in £126m deal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly at the head of the queue for Bayer Leverkusen attacker Florian Wirtz, who could cost £126m.

arts.ttl: ‘They don’t help in defence’ – Carlo Ancelotti on Real Madrid’s lack of ‘balance’
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Friday turned heads, with his comments on the club’s lack of balance over the early weeks of the season. Spanish champions Real…

arts.ttl: The LaLiga and Champions League unbeaten records Real Madrid can break this season
arts.sum: All in all, Real Madrid are undefeated in their last 50 games in LaLiga and the Champions League combined. The 15-time European champions would then have to win or draw their next five LaLiga games to match Barcelona’s record of 43 without defeat in 2017 and 2018.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Real to turn to Liverpool target as Rodri alternative?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly considering turning their attentions towards a move for Martin Zubimendi, should they fail in their pursuit of Manchester City's Rodri.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti uses Barcelona’s red card mistake vs Monaco as reference for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Friday highlighted the costly mistake made by arch rivals Barcelona in their Champions League meeting with Monaco as an opportunity for his…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for La Liga match against Espanyol
arts.sum: However, Real Madrid still have a thin squad right now, so these rotations are not guaranteed just yet. Real Madrid have published their squad list for Saturday’s home match against Espanyol, which will kick off at 9pm CET.
